kennelTipLean.note: Nobody's confident. The board's split between doomers picking 30+ and a few delusionals reckoning we win by 100. Bookies have us as $2.59 outsiders and the vibe matches.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: Ciro I don't need the whole team to change just get Salmon out of the starting line up please bare minimum

debates.question: Does Salmon start at lock or get bumped to the bench?
debates.kennel: GAMEDAY thread is one long plea to get Salmon out of the run-on side.

debates.question: Who wears 7 next to Galvin?
debates.kennel: Early Whispers and GAMEDAY are split between SOS and Conti — and someone's floated Burton shifting to lock to free up the spot.

trivia.question: How many premierships have the Bulldogs won?
trivia.explainer: Canterbury have won 8 first-grade titles — 1938, 1942, 1980, 1984, 1985, 1988, 1995 and 2004.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs against the Cowboys?
recap.explainer: Sua led the Dogs with 183 run metres — and the next week he signed with Perth. Make of that what you will.

washup.headline: Cooked at Accor and the bloke carrying us is off to Perth.
washup.vibe: 12-28 at home to the Cowboys and we conceded four tries in the last half hour. Galvin scored, Curran scored, then it was just Drinkwater and Burns running through us. Sitting 12th, Ciro's getting torched on the boards, and our top metre-eater just signed a 4-year deal with the Bears. Lovely.
washup.kennelSummary: The sack-Ciro thread cracked 949 replies and AlzzBulldog is leading a one-man crusade about Galvin getting shifted to centre while up 6. Gus is wearing it too — 'no 9, no 1, no speed' — and the Sua exit has lit a fire under the recruitment thread. Nobody's defending anything right now.

kennelHotTakes.quote: 5 years as GM and we enter a so-called premiership window with no 9, no 1 and no speed at all. All we have is Preston.
kennelHotTakes.author: liljohny

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Rnd 10 Vs Dolphins Thurs 7:50pm @ Suncorp
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Everyone's pleading with Ciro to drop Salmon from the starting 13 and arguing about whether SOS or Conti should partner Galvin. One bloke reckons Dogs by 100+, the rest are just hoping for any change.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Early whispers
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Issa87 dropped a 'whisper' that Burton is shifting to lock with Crichton to fullback and Tracey to the wing. The thread immediately decided that's Chinese whispers and Burton at lock would be a disaster.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Ciraldo should be sacked tonight
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: AlzzBulldog is going scorched earth — accusing Ciro of sabotage for shifting Galvin to centre while up by 6 with Xerri on the bench. Quickly turned into a Gus pile-on too, 5 years and no hooker, no fullback, no speed.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Sua to Perth 4 yr deal
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Sua confirmed gone to the Bears on a 4-year deal after carrying us for 183m against the Cowboys. Everyone's spewing — 'he outplayed all our backs' and the club apparently sat on their hands while Floptoya keeps his spot.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Recruitment
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Freakzilla doing the cap maths — $2.5m on three centres, 800k on a six playing seven. Watching the Roosters and concluding their 1-13 beats ours in every single position.
